acceptance_targets: [CH04-F001] PASS only if the revised spans around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:53-57 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:129-131 contain at least two concrete physical details of manipulation plus one immediate embodied reaction from Lena; FAIL if the reveal is still carried mainly by abstract nouns like 'horror', 'network', or 'ghost story' without new material specifics.

[CH04-F002] PASS only if the revised text in those spans includes one explicit safeguard (for example, withholding names until lot-level corroboration) and one explicit cost/risk to Lena or Beau; FAIL if the response remains a brief acknowledgment followed by immediate procedural transition.

[CH04-F003] PASS only if the revised logistics sequence includes one failed attempt that changes Lena/Beau's tactic and one clue that must be cross-checked before they trust it; FAIL if each new contact still hands over the next key lead on first ask.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised spans around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:53-57 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:129-131 contain at least two concrete physical details of manipulation plus one immediate embodied reaction from Lena; FAIL if the reveal is still carried mainly by abstract nouns like 'horror', 'network', or 'ghost story' without new material specifics.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift at the chapter's core reveal: the manipulated-remains turn is reported in clean procedural language and abstract framing, then compressed into summary beats, which mutes bodily and moral consequence at the moment tension should peak.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the forensic reveal and aftermath at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:129, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:245 to render concrete physical evidence (not just category labels) and immediate consequence in-scene; keep Rao precise, but give Lena at least one unabstracted sensory confrontation with what was done to the remains.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised text in those spans includes one explicit safeguard (for example, withholding names until lot-level corroboration) and one explicit cost/risk to Lena or Beau; FAIL if the response remains a brief acknowledgment followed by immediate procedural transition.
findings.problem: Timidity under pressure: the chapter raises explicit racial scapegoating risk, then retreats to procedural movement without forcing a hard ethical or tactical commitment on-page.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:123-127 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:229-233, add a concrete decision scene where Lena and Beau define how they will prevent a Bell-family scapegoat narrative and what institutional cost they are accepting by doing it.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised logistics sequence includes one failed attempt that changes Lena/Beau's tactic and one clue that must be cross-checked before they trust it; FAIL if each new contact still hands over the next key lead on first ask.
findings.problem: Convenience stack in clue delivery: Trina, Darlene, and Whitaker each provide the exact next breadcrumb in sequence, so the investigative chain feels pre-laid instead of contested.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the access path across snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:169-210 so at least one lead resists, misdirects, or costs leverage before yielding usable data; keep the same endpoint but make the causal path harder won.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
